tEn: Gemini 2.5: Pushing the Frontier with Advanced Reasoning, Multimodality, Long Context, and Next Generation Agentic Capabilities
tZh: Gemini 2.5：以高级推理、多模态、长上下文和下一代智能体能力推动前沿
sEn: Gemini 2.5 models push the frontier with advanced reasoning, multimodality, long context, and next-gen agentic capabilities.
sZh: Gemini 2.5 模型通过高级推理、多模态、长上下文和下一代智能体能力推动前沿。
absEn: In this report, we introduce the Gemini 2.X model family: Gemini 2.5 Pro and Gemini 2.5 Flash, as well as our earlier Gemini 2.0 Flash and Flash-Lite models. Gemini 2.5 Pro is our most capable model yet, achieving SoTA performance on frontier coding and reasoning benchmarks. In addition to its incredible coding and reasoning skills, Gemini 2.5 Pro is a thinking model that excels at multimodal understanding and it is now able to process up to 3 hours of video content. Its unique combination of long context, multimodal and reasoning capabilities can be combined to unlock new agentic workflows. Gemini 2.5 Flash provides excellent reasoning abilities at a fraction of the compute and latency requirements and Gemini 2.0 Flash and Flash-Lite provide high performance at low latency and cost. Taken together, the Gemini 2.X model generation spans the full Pareto frontier of model capability vs cost, allowing users to explore the boundaries of what is possible with complex agentic problem solving.
absZh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了 Gemini 2.X 模型系列：Gemini 2.5 Pro 和 Gemini 2.5 Flash，以及早期的 Gemini 2.0 Flash 和 Flash-Lite 模型。Gemini 2.5 Pro 是我们目前最强大的模型，在前沿编码和推理基准测试中达到了最先进的性能。除了其卓越的编码和推理能力外，Gemini 2.5 Pro 还是一个擅长多模态理解的思考模型，现在能够处理长达 3 小时的视频内容。其长上下文、多模态和推理能力的独特组合可以结合起来，解锁新的智能体工作流程。Gemini 2.5 Flash 以极低的计算和延迟需求提供了出色的推理能力，而 Gemini 2.0 Flash 和 Flash-Lite 则以低延迟和低成本提供了高性能。总的来说，Gemini 2.X 模型系列覆盖了模型能力与成本之间的完整帕累托前沿，使用户能够探索复杂智能体问题解决的可能性边界。

contrib.en: Introduces Gemini 2.5 Pro, achieving SoTA on frontier coding and reasoning benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 推出 Gemini 2.5 Pro，在前沿编码和推理基准上达到最先进水平。

contrib.en: Gemini 2.5 Pro is a thinking model with advanced multimodal understanding and up to 3-hour video processing.
contrib.zh: Gemini 2.5 Pro 是一款具备高级多模态理解能力且可处理长达 3 小时视频的思考模型。

contrib.en: Combines long context, multimodal, and reasoning capabilities to unlock new agentic workflows.
contrib.zh: 结合长上下文、多模态和推理能力，解锁新的智能体工作流。

contrib.en: Gemini 2.5 Flash provides excellent reasoning at lower compute and latency.
contrib.zh: Gemini 2.5 Flash 以更低的算力和延迟提供出色的推理能力。

contrib.en: Gemini 2.X family spans the full Pareto frontier of model capability vs cost.
contrib.zh: Gemini 2.X 系列覆盖模型能力与成本的全帕累托前沿。

contrib.en: All models are natively multimodal with >1M token context and native tool use.
contrib.zh: 所有模型原生支持多模态、超过 100 万 token 的上下文和原生工具使用。

limits.en: Report focuses on model capabilities without extensive real-world deployment analysis.
limits.zh: 报告侧重于模型能力，未进行广泛的真实世界部署分析。

limits.en: Performance claims are based on benchmarks which may not reflect all use cases.
limits.zh: 性能声明基于基准测试，可能无法反映所有用例。

limits.en: Long context and agentic capabilities may introduce new failure modes not fully explored.
limits.zh: 长上下文和智能体能力可能引入尚未充分探索的新故障模式。

limits.en: Cost and latency trade-offs are model-specific and may vary with task complexity.
limits.zh: 成本和延迟的权衡因模型而异，并可能随任务复杂度变化。

items.en: In this report, we introduce the Gemini 2.X model family: Gemini 2.5 Pro and Gemini 2.5 Flash, as well as our earlier Gemini 2.0 Flash and Flash-Lite models. Gemini 2.5 Pro is our most capable model yet, achieving SoTA performance on frontier coding and reasoning benchmarks. In addition to its incredible coding and reasoning skills, Gemini 2.5 Pro is a thinking model that excels at multimodal understanding and it is now able to process up to 3 hours of video content. Its unique combination of long context, multimodal and reasoning capabilities can be combined to unlock new agentic workflows. Gemini 2.5 Flash provides excellent reasoning abilities at a fraction of the compute and latency requirements and Gemini 2.0 Flash and Flash-Lite provide high performance at low latency and cost. Taken together, the Gemini 2.X model generation spans the full Pareto frontier of model capability vs cost, allowing users to explore the boundaries of what is possible with complex agentic problem solving.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍 Gemini 2.X 模型系列：Gemini 2.5 Pro 和 Gemini 2.5 Flash，以及我们早期的 Gemini 2.0 Flash 和 Flash-Lite 模型。Gemini 2.5 Pro 是我们目前能力最强的模型，在前沿编码和推理基准上达到了 SoTA 性能。除了其卓越的编码和推理能力外，Gemini 2.5 Pro 还是一个擅长多模态理解的思考模型，现在能够处理长达 3 小时的视频内容。其长上下文、多模态和推理能力的独特组合可以结合起来，解锁新的智能体式工作流。Gemini 2.5 Flash 以极低的算力和延迟要求提供出色的推理能力，而 Gemini 2.0 Flash 和 Flash-Lite 则以低延迟和低成本提供高性能。总体而言，Gemini 2.X 模型代际覆盖了模型能力与成本之间的完整帕累托前沿，使用户能够探索复杂智能体式问题解决的可能性边界。

items.en: We present our latest family of natively multimodal models with advanced reasoning through thinking, long context and tool-use capabilities: Gemini 2.5 Pro and 2.5 Flash and our earlier Gemini 2.0 Flash and Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite models. Together these form a new family of highly-capable models representing our next generation of AI models, designed to power a new era of agentic systems. Building upon the foundation of the Gemini 1.5 series (geminiteam2024gemini), this Gemini 2.X generation brings us closer to the vision of a universal AI assistant (universalaiassistant).
items.zh: 我们展示了最新的原生多模态模型系列，这些模型通过思考、长上下文和工具使用能力实现高级推理：Gemini 2.5 Pro 和 2.5 Flash，以及我们早期的 Gemini 2.0 Flash 和 Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite 模型。这些模型共同构成了一个高能力模型的新系列，代表了我们下一代 AI 模型，旨在驱动智能体系统的新时代。在 Gemini 1.5 系列（geminiteam2024gemini）的基础上，Gemini 2.X 代际使我们更接近通用 AI 助手的愿景（universalaiassistant）。

items.en: The Gemini 2.X series are all built to be natively multimodal, supporting long context inputs of >1 million tokens and have native tool use support. This allows them to comprehend vast datasets and handle complex problems from different information sources, including text, audio, images, video and even entire code repositories. These extensive capabilities can also be combined to build complex agentic systems, as happened in the case of Gemini Plays Pokémon111Pokémon is a trademark of Nintendo Co., Ltd., Creatures Inc., and Game Freak Inc. (gpp2025twitch). Different models in the series have different strengths and capabilities: (1) Gemini 2.5 Pro is our most intelligent thinking model, exhibiting strong reasoning and code capabilities. It excels at producing interactive web applications, is capable of codebase-level understanding and also exhibits emergent multimodal coding abilities. (2) Gemini 2.5 Flash is our hybrid reasoning model with a controllable thinking budget, and is useful for most complex tasks while also controlling the tradeoff between quality, cost, and latency. (3) Gemini 2.0 Flash is our fast and cost-efficient non-thinking model for everyday tasks and (4) Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient model, built for at-scale usage. A full comparison of the models in the Gemini 2.X model family is provided in Table 1. Taken together, the Gemini 2.X family of models cover the whole Pareto frontier of model capability vs cost, shifting it forward across a large variety of core capabilities, applications and use-cases, see Figure 1.
items.zh: Gemini 2.X 系列均构建为原生多模态，支持超过 100 万 token 的长上下文输入，并具有原生工具使用支持。这使得它们能够理解海量数据集，并处理来自不同信息源（包括文本、音频、图像、视频甚至整个代码库）的复杂问题。这些广泛的能力还可以结合起来构建复杂的智能体系统，正如 Gemini Plays Pokémon111Pokémon 是 Nintendo Co., Ltd.、Creatures Inc. 和 Game Freak Inc. 的商标（gpp2025twitch）案例中所发生的那样。系列中的不同模型具有不同的优势和能力：（1）Gemini 2.5 Pro 是我们最智能的思考模型，表现出强大的推理和代码能力。它擅长生成交互式 Web 应用程序，能够进行代码库级别的理解，并展现出涌现的多模态编码能力。（2）Gemini 2.5 Flash 是我们的混合推理模型，具有可控的思考预算，适用于大多数复杂任务，同时控制质量、成本和延迟之间的权衡。（3）Gemini 2.0 Flash 是我们快速且经济高效的非思考模型，适用于日常任务；（4）Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite 是我们最快且最具成本效益的模型，专为大规模使用而构建。Gemini 2.X 模型系列中模型的完整比较见表 1。总体而言，Gemini 2.X 模型系列覆盖了模型能力与成本之间的整个帕累托前沿，在多种核心能力、应用和用例上向前推进，见图 1。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Cost-performance plot. Gemini 2.5 Pro is a marked improvement over Gemini 1.5 Pro, and has an LMArena score that is over 120 points higher than Gemini 1.5 Pro. Cost is a weighted average of input and output tokens pricing per million tokens. Source: LMArena, imported on 2025-06-16.
items.capZh: 图 1：成本-性能图。Gemini 2.5 Pro 相比 Gemini 1.5 Pro 有显著改进，其 LMArena 得分比 Gemini 1.5 Pro 高出 120 多分。成本是每百万 token 输入和输出 token 定价的加权平均值。来源：LMArena，导入于 2025-06-16。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Number of output tokens generated per second (after the first chunk has been received from the API) for different models. Source: ArtificialAnalysis.ai, imported on 2025-06-15.
items.capZh: 图 2：不同模型每秒生成的输出 token 数（从 API 接收到第一个块后）。来源：ArtificialAnalysis.ai，导入于 2025-06-15。
